name: OpenMontage
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        calesthio /

      OpenMontage  

    
      World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
summary: OpenMontage 是全球首个开源、智能体驱动的视频制作系统，包含12条流水线、52个工具和500多项智能体技能，能将AI编程助手转变为完整的视频制作工作室，值得关注因为它开创性地将AI代理能力与专业视频生产流程深度整合。

name: penpot
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        penpot /

      penpot  

    
      Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration
summary: Penpot 是一个开源的设计工具，旨在实现设计师与开发者之间的无缝协作。它值得关注，因为它是 Figma 的免费开源替代品，支持 SVG 原生格式和实时协作，且无需任何商业许可。

name: deer-flow
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        bytedance /

      deer-flow  

    
      An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
summary: Deer Flow 是字节跳动开源的长周期超级智能体框架，能在沙箱、记忆、工具和子智能体等模块支持下，自主完成从研究、编程到创作、耗时数分钟到数小时的多层级任务，因其高度模块化与可扩展的架构而值得关注。

name: codebase-memory-mcp
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        DeusData /

      codebase-memory-mcp  

    
      High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
summary: 该项目是一个高性能代码智能MCP服务器，能将代码库索引为持久化知识图谱，支持158种语言、毫秒级查询且减少99%的令牌消耗。值得关注的是它作为单一静态二进制文件零依赖运行，大幅提升了代码理解和检索效率。

name: mukul975
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        mukul975 /

      Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills  

    
      754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0
summary: 该项目提供了754个结构化的网络安全技能，并映射到MITRE ATT&CK等五大框架，支持Claude Code、GitHub Copilot等20多个平台，是构建AI安全代理的标准化技能库，值得关注。

name: asgeirtj
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        asgeirtj /

      system_prompts_leaks  

    
      Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
summary: 该项目提取并公开了Anthropic、OpenAI、Google、xAI等多家AI模型的系统提示词，并定期更新，值得关注因为它揭示了主流AI产品的底层指令设计。

name: chopratejas
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        chopratejas /

      headroom  

    
      Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
summary: 该项目是一个用于压缩工具输出、日志、文件和RAG分块的Python库/代理/MCP服务器，能在保持答案质量的同时减少60-95%的令牌消耗，值得关注是因为它显著降低了LLM使用成本且不影响效果。

name: palmier-pro
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        palmier-io /

      palmier-pro  

    
      macOS video editor built for AI
summary: Palmier Pro 是一款专为 AI 打造的 macOS 视频编辑器，值得关注因为它将原生性能与 AI 工作流深度整合，为视频创作者提供了高效智能的剪辑体验。
